description: A guest is unhappy with their room's location (e.g., too close to the elevator) and requests a different room.

nodes.task_description: Empathize with the guest and check for availability of other rooms of the same type.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms other standard king rooms are available.

nodes.task_description: Select a suitable new room away from the elevator and update the guest's reservation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reassigns the guest to a new room in the PMS.

nodes.task_description: Issue new keys for the new room and arrange for a bellman to help the guest move their luggage.

expected_outcome.value: New keys are issued, and a bellman is dispatched.
